title.sl: Stenska polica za telefon ob postelji

short.en: Wall-mounted dock with a hidden cable channel — phone charges sitting against the wall.
short.sl: Stenska polica s skritim kanalom za kabel — telefon se polni naslonjen ob steno.

description.en: USB-C cable feeds up through a 12 mm grommet hole and clips into a strain-relief slot. The dock holds phones up to 8.5 mm thick (with case). Two M3 anchors, prints in PLA upright with no supports.
description.sl: USB-C kabel poteka skozi 12 mm odprtino in se zaskoči v reže za razbremenitev. Polica drži telefone do 8,5 mm debeline (skupaj z ovitkom). Dva M3 sidra, tiska se pokončno iz PLA brez podpor.
